Chief Author.purpose: Owns final prose, selection, voice unity, revision authority, and final acceptance decisions.

Idea Assistant.purpose: Generates abundant raw material and creative candidates.

Research Assistant.purpose: Expands assets, places, phenomena, objects, and scene mechanisms.

Ammo Librarian.purpose: Classifies raw ammo, assigns IDs, tags entries, updates the ammo index, and manages status movement before author selection.

Canon Keeper.purpose: Maintains canon, continuity ledgers, and canon change records.

Development Editor.purpose: Reviews structure, stakes, character pressure, pacing, and large-scale story issues.

Continuity Editor.purpose: Checks hard conflicts in character, event, time, place, form, object, and environment state.

Line Editor.purpose: Reviews prose, rhythm, voice, repetition, imagery, and scene-level execution.

Copy Editor.purpose: Checks names, formatting, local consistency, grammar, and copy-level issues.

Proofreader.purpose: Checks final typos, punctuation, and residual issues.

Publisher.purpose: Freezes approved chapters and records release decisions.
